title: Theneo Project
description: A Project represents an API documentation project on the Theneo platform, containing imported API specifications and published documentation.

id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug of the project.

workspaceId.description: The identifier of the workspace this project belongs to.

published.description: Whether the project documentation is published.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the project was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the project was last updated.
